overall.description: A first-person perspective video from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a transition from a sandstorm-swept highway to a vibrant neon-lit futuristic cityscape. The player character walks through elevated walkways and plazas surrounded by towering skyscrapers with massive holographic advertisements, eventually climbing stairs to an overlook with views of the city traffic below.

tall modern street lamp post with horizontal arm
palm fronds visible against the orange sky
large billboard structure visible through the haze across the highway
road signs and gantries spanning the highway

segments.scene_description: Walking along a highway during a severe sandstorm with orange-red atmospheric haze. Street lamps and guardrails line the road while a lone pedestrian is visible in the distance through the thick haze.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a vibrant cyberpunk city at night. The camera looks up at towering skyscrapers covered in massive holographic advertisements and neon signage, standing on a paved plaza surrounded by modern glass architecture.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet reflective elevated walkway toward a building with prominent EMBER signage. The path is lined with neon underlighting and overhead bridge structures, with holographic towers visible in the background.

segments.scene_description: Approaching a brightly illuminated stairway entrance with purple neon pillars. The EMBER building signage remains visible in the background while other pedestrians appear near the stairs.

events.description: begins ascending stairs toward upper observation deck level

segments.scene_description: Ascending an outdoor stairway flanked by metal railings and artificial lighting. The view opens up to show the holographic tower and city skyline above while leaving the lower plaza behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated observation deck overlooking city traffic

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated observation deck with safety railings, overlooking the city traffic below. A lone NPC stands at the railing admiring the view while neon-lit towers and palm trees frame the panoramic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a desolate, storm-swept highway into the heart of a vibrant, neon-lit futuristic metropolis. It begins by pushing through a severe sandstorm with an orange-red haze and distant pedestrians, before the atmosphere abruptly shifts into a night-time cityscape dominated by towering skyscrapers and massive holographic advertisements. The camera then glides across a wet, reflective elevated walkway toward the glowing EMBER signage, passing under neon-lit bridges and purple pillars as it approaches a brightly illuminated stairway. As the camera ascends these stairs, the lower plaza falls away to reveal an expansive skyline of holographic towers and artificial lights. Finally, the movement leads onto an elevated observation deck, where the view opens up to a panoramic cityscape of flowing traffic and neon towers framed by synthetic palm trees.
